hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; npx --yes prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) npx --yes eslint --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; sed -i '' '/^[[:space:]]*$/d' "$f" 2>/dev/null; npx --yes prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; true
